revision.text:
{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Taoism | class = hlist | image = [[File:Tao.svg|75px|class=skin-invert|Tao|link=Tao]] | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Taoism|a series]] on | title = [[Taoism]] | expanded = {{{expand|{{{1|}}}}}} | above = * [[Outline of Taoism|Outline]] * [[History of Taoism|History]] | list1name = Concepts | list1title = Concepts | list1 = * [[Taoist philosophy]] * [[Tao]] * ''[[De (Chinese)|De]]'' * ''[[Wuji (philosophy)|Wuji]]'' * ''[[Taiji (philosophy)|Taiji]]'' ** [[Yin and yang]] * [[Bagua]] * ''[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Wuxing]]'' (five phases) * ''[[Bianhua]]'' * ''[[Fan (Daoism)|Fan]]'' (reversal) * ''[[Wu wei]]'' (non-action) * ''[[Ziran]]'' * ''[[Xian (Taoism)|Xian]]'' (immortal) * ''[[Zhenren]]'' * [[True form (Taoism)|True form]] * [[Three Treasures (traditional Chinese medicine)|Three Treasures]] ** ''[[Jing (Chinese medicine)|Jing]]'' ** [[Qi]] ** ''[[Shen (Chinese religion)|Shen]]'' * [[Hun and po|''Hun'' and ''po'']]
| list2name = Practices | list2title = Practices | list2 = * [[Three Treasures (Taoism)|Three Treasures (virtues)]] * [[Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * Alchemy ** ''[[Neidan]]'' ** ''[[Waidan]]'' * ''[[Bugang]]'' * ''[[Chu (Taoism)|Chu]]'' * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] (''[[Bigu (grain avoidance)|Bigu]]'') * [[Taoist sexual practices|Sexual practices]] * [[Taoist art|Art]] * ''[[Fulu]]'' * [[Daoshi|Priesthood]]
| list3name = Texts | list3title = Texts | list3 = * ''[[I Ching]]'' * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[Daozang]]''
| list4name = Deities | list4title = [[Taoist theology|Theology]] | list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[Daode Tianzun]] * [[Four heavenly ministers]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Eight Immortals]] * [[Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu]] * [[Li Hong (Taoist eschatology)|Li Hong]] * [[Body god]] | list5name = People | list5title = [[List of Taoists|People]] | list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] ---- <!--Qin and Han dynasties--> * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] ---- <!-- Three Kingdoms, Jin dynasty, Northern and Southern dynasties --> * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Sun Hanhua]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[Ge Hong]] * [[Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] ---- <!--Tang to Song dynasties--> * [[Cheng Xuanying]] * [[Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] ---- <!--Yuan to Qing dynasties--> * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] ---- * ''[[Fangshi]]'' | list6name = Schools | list6title = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] | list6 = * [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School]] * [[Way of the Li Family]] * [[Lingbao School]] * [[Chongxuan School|Chongxuan School]] * [[Quanzhen School]] ** [[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai]] ---- * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] ** [[Way of the Celestial Masters#The Southern Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao]] ---- * [[Chinese ritual mastery traditions]] ** [[Yao Taoism]]
| list7name = Sacred places | list7title = Sacred places | list7 = * [[Grotto-heavens]] * [[Sacred Mountains of China]] ** [[Wudang Mountains]] * [[Mount Penglai]] * [[Kunlun (mythology)|Mount Kunlun]] * [[Taoist temple]] ** [[White Cloud Temple]] ** [[Louguantai]] ** [[Cebu Taoist Temple]] ** [[Taoist Temple (Hanford, California)]]
| list8name = Institutions and organizations | list8title = Institutions and organizations | list8 = * [[Chinese Taoist Association]] * [[List of Celestial Masters|Celestial Master]]s * [[Taoist priest]]s }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Taoism | class = hlist | image = [[File:Tao.svg|75px|class=skin-invert|Tao|link=Tao]] | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Taoism|a series]] on | title = [[Taoism]] | expanded = {{{expand|{{{1|}}}}}} | above = * [[Outline of Taoism|Outline]] * [[History of Taoism|History]] | list1name = Concepts | list1title = Concepts | list1 = * [[Taoist philosophy]] * [[Tao]] * ''[[De (Chinese)|De]]'' * ''[[Wuji (philosophy)|Wuji]]'' * ''[[Taiji (philosophy)|Taiji]]'' ** [[Yin and yang]] * [[Bagua]] * ''[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Wuxing]]'' (five phases) * ''[[Bianhua]]'' * ''[[Fan (Daoism)|Fan]]'' (reversal) * ''[[Wu wei]]'' (non-action) * ''[[Ziran]]'' * ''[[Xian (Taoism)|Xian]]'' (immortal) * ''[[Zhenren]]'' * [[True form (Taoism)|True form]] * [[Three Treasures (traditional Chinese medicine)|Three Treasures]] ** ''[[Jing (Chinese medicine)|Jing]]'' ** [[Qi]] ** ''[[Shen (Chinese religion)|Shen]]'' * [[Hun and po|''Hun'' and ''po'']]
| list2name = Practices | list2title = Practices | list2 = * [[Three Treasures (Taoism)|Three Treasures (virtues)]] * [[Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * Alchemy ** ''[[Neidan]]'' ** ''[[Waidan]]'' * ''[[Bugang]]'' * ''[[Chu (Taoism)|Chu]]'' * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] (''[[Bigu (grain avoidance)|Bigu]]'') * [[Taoist sexual practices|Sexual practices]] * [[Taoist art|Art]] * ''[[Fulu]]'' * [[Daoshi|Priesthood]]
| list3name = Texts | list3title = Texts | list3 = * ''[[I Ching]]'' * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[Daozang]]''
| list4name = Deities | list4title = [[Taoist theology|Theology]] | list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[Daode Tianzun]] * [[Four heavenly ministers]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Eight Immortals]] * [[Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu]] * [[Li Hong (Taoist eschatology)|Li Hong]] * [[Body god]] | list5name = People | list5title = [[List of Taoists|People]] | list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] ---- <!--Qin and Han dynasties--> * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] ---- <!-- Three Kingdoms, Jin dynasty, Northern and Southern dynasties --> * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Sun Hanhua]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[Ge Hong]] * [[Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] ---- <!--Tang to Song dynasties--> * [[Cheng Xuanying]] * [[Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] ---- <!--Yuan to Qing dynasties--> * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] ---- * ''[[Fangshi]]'' | list6name = Schools | list6title = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] | list6 = * [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School]] * [[Way of the Li Family]] * [[Lingbao School]] * [[Chongxuan School|Chongxuan School]] * [[Quanzhen School]] ** [[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai]] ---- * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] ** [[Way of the Celestial Masters#The Southern Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao]] ---- * [[Chinese ritual mastery traditions]] ** [[Yao Taoism]]
| list7name = Sacred places | list7title = Sacred places | list7 = * [[Grotto-heavens]] * [[Sacred Mountains of China]] ** [[Wudang Mountains]] * [[Mount Penglai]] * [[Kunlun (mythology)|Mount Kunlun]] * [[Taoist temple]] ** [[White Cloud Temple]] ** [[Louguantai]] ** [[Cebu Taoist Temple]] ** [[Taoist Temple (Hanford, California)]]
| list8name = Institutions and organizations | list8title = Institutions and organizations | list8 = * [[Chinese Taoist Association]] * [[List of Celestial Masters|Celestial Master]]s * [[Taoist priest]]s }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

| list2name = Practices | list2title = Practices | list2 = * [[Three Treasures (Taoism)|Three Treasures (virtues)]] * [[Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * Alchemy ** ''[[Neidan]]'' ** ''[[Waidan]]'' * ''[[Bugang]]'' * ''[[Chu (Taoism)|Chu]]'' * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] (''[[Bigu (grain avoidance)|Bigu]]'') * [[Taoist sexual practices|Sexual practices]] * [[Taoist art|Art]] * ''[[Fulu]]'' * [[Daoshi|Priesthood]]
| list3name = Texts | list3title = Texts | list3 = * ''[[I Ching]]'' * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[Daozang]]''
| list4name = Deities | list4title = [[Taoist theology|Theology]] | list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[Daode Tianzun]] * [[Four heavenly ministers]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Eight Immortals]] * [[Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu]] * [[Li Hong (Taoist eschatology)|Li Hong]] * [[Body god]] | list5name = People | list5title = [[List of Taoists|People]] | list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] ---- <!--Qin and Han dynasties--> * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] ---- <!-- Three Kingdoms, Jin dynasty, Northern and Southern dynasties --> * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Sun Hanhua]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[Ge Hong]] * [[:en:Bao Jingyan|Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] ---- <!--Tang to Song dynasties--> * [[Cheng Xuanying]] * [[Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] ---- <!--Yuan to Qing dynasties--> * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] ---- * ''[[:en:Fangshi|Fangshi]]'' | list6name = Schools | list6title = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] | list6 = * [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School]] * [[Way of the Li Family]] * [[Lingbao School]] * [[Chongxuan School|Chongxuan School]] * [[Quanzhen School]] ** [[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai]] ---- * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] ** [[Way of the Celestial Masters#The Southern Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao]] ---- * [[Chinese ritual mastery traditions]] ** [[Yao Taoism]]
| list7name = Sacred places | list7title = Sacred places | list7 = * [[Grotto-heavens]] * [[Sacred Mountains of China]] ** [[Wudang Mountains]] * [[Mount Penglai]] * [[Kunlun (mythology)|Mount Kunlun]] * [[Taoist temple]] ** [[White Cloud Temple]] ** [[Louguantai]] ** [[Cebu Taoist Temple]] ** [[Taoist Temple (Hanford, California)]]
| list8name = Institutions and organizations | list8title = Institutions and organizations | list8 = * [[Chinese Taoist Association]] * [[List of Celestial Masters|Celestial Master]]s * [[Taoist priest]]s }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
